who: HR payroll specialists in small accounting firms processing 5–15 payroll summaries/month
offer: For HR payroll specialists in small accounting firms processing 5–15 payroll summaries/month, inefficient data handling causes late payroll submissions. We streamline the formatting of time-tracking data instead of manual data entry and formatting.
problem: Inefficient conversion of time-tracking data into payroll summaries
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for HR payroll specialists
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to HR payroll specialists with demo video
Community forums for HR payroll specialists sharing tools
try_it: Let users try manual data entry interface and templates on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
